steps.title: Target the quantity claim
steps.content: The astronomers claim that planets are made of the same materials as their host stars in equal or smaller quantities.

steps.title: Find the direct contradiction
steps.content: A and B discuss stars without showing a planet-star quantity conflict; D questions a method but not the claim. Planets with considerably more iron than their host stars would directly break the "equal or smaller" relationship. The answer is C.
